title: The Unique Personas of BTS Members
content:
Stepping out of a limo at the Billboard Music Awards in 2017, Jin was captured in a glamorous snapshot that caught the internet’s attention. He now goes by the moniker Worldwide Handsome, along with other nicknames like Car Door Guy. Jin was scouted on the street in Seoul while studying as a university theater student. Originally hired for his good looks, he learned to sing for BTS and eventually recorded his first solo single, 'Awake.' A devoted foodie, Jin also garnered an audience with a popular food vlog called Eat Jin.

V is the R&B crooner of the bunch, known for his smooth baritone voice that sizzles on the band’s lower-tempo songs. He joined the band after impressing Big Hit Entertainment at a regional audition held in his hometown of Daegu. Also a talented actor, he made his debut in the period K-drama Hwarang: The Poet Warrior Youth. V has an interest in photography and coined the phrase 'I purple you' while speaking with a fan in 2016. That color has since become the band’s official favorite.

Starting in his teens as an underground rapper, Suga got his current moniker from early years spent playing basketball. He is known for his introspective, rapid-fire rhymes and is vocal about mental health and politics. He is also a producer with a private studio, Genius Lab, and has contributed to many award-winning songs. In 2020, under his Agust D moniker, he released a 10-track collection of thoughtful raps recorded during the COVID-19 quarantine. Suga has also rocked more hair colors than any other band member, including mint green, red, orange, lilac, and gray.
